description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows using VCPKG) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring changes to markdown files, LICENSE, and build directories. Run a build job on multiple Windows environments (2019 and 2022) with various architectures (amd64, amd64_x86, amd64_arm64) and build types (Debug, Release, with VCPKG, Clang, MinGW). Install Ninja, set up the VCPKG environment, install VCPKG dependencies, configure CMake with the VCPKG toolchain, and build the project.
